metadata.description: Content Studio — an AI content pipeline (skills + agents + deterministic gates) for Claude Code.

plugins.name: content-studio
plugins.description: Plan, research, draft, review, and publish content through deterministic, zero-dependency gates. Ships content-type skills (SEO, long-form fiction, kids' stories, YouTube/Xiaohongshu/short-drama scripts, graded readers, interactive/game/audio stories), editorial subagents, and the gate scripts that enforce the workflow.
